name: Liège

overview.description: Liège is a French-speaking industrial city on the Meuse river with a well-regarded university. Content below is a starter sample.

attractions.name: Liège-Guillemins Station
attractions.description: A striking modern railway station designed by Santiago Calatrava.

transportation.description: TEC operates buses and a modern tram line through the city.

foodSpots.name: Indian restaurants near the city centre

tips: French is the primary language in Liège.
